title: The Practice of Deep Listening Beyond Tinnitus
phrases: "The self you're trying to improve is the same self doing the improving. Notice the circularity."

"If your spiritual practice makes you more rigid, it's not working."
"You are not a problem to be solved. You are a process to be witnessed."
interjections: And this is the part nobody talks about.
I get it. Really, I do.
